data.title: Two Prime will manage $250 million worth of Bitcoin held by Digital Wealth Partners.
data.description: Bitcoin financial services provider Two Prime announced that Digital Wealth Partners (DWP), a digital asset investment advisory (RIA) firm, has selected Two Prime to manage approximately $250 million of Bitcoin for its clients. Two Prime aims to expand Digital Wealth Partners' Bitcoin holdings and protect assets during market volatility by offering a low-volatility Bitcoin-denominated return investment strategy through independently managed accounts. (Businesswire)

data.title: Hassett: If he accepts the position of Federal Reserve Chairman, he will commit to maintaining his independence.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that if he accepts the position of Federal Reserve Chairman, he will commit to improving transparency and pledge to uphold the Fed's independence. He added that the Fed's investigation was simply a request for information, which will be completed quickly, and then the process will continue. He anticipates no issues with the Fed's cost overruns and hopes for greater transparency. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hassett: Trump could immediately implement the 10% tariff after the Supreme Court makes an unfavorable ruling.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that following an unfavorable ruling by the U.S. Supreme Court, Trump could immediately implement the 10% tariff. (Jinshi)

data.title: Spot silver touched $89 per ounce, down 3.66% on the day.
data.description: Spot silver touched $89/oz, down 3.66% on the day; New York silver futures fell sharply by 4.00% to $88.63/oz. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin as 'Element of Resistance': The Cryptocurrency Boom in Uprising Iran
data.description:
In Iran, amid inflation, protests and internet blackouts, Bitcoin is becoming a financial survival tool. A Chainalysis report reveals unprecedented crypto growth, between individual freedom and state use to circumvent sanctions.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/bitcoin-as-element-of-resistance-the-cryptocurrency-boom-in-uprising-iran/

data.title: Jefferies strategist: Bitcoin removed from portfolio due to concerns about quantum computing risks.
data.description: In his latest "Greed & Fear" market newsletter, Jefferies strategist Christopher Wood stated that he has completely removed Bitcoin from his flagship portfolio due to growing concerns that advances in quantum computing could jeopardize the long-term security of cryptocurrencies. His initial 10% Bitcoin allocation, first added at the end of 2020, has been replaced by a combined position in physical gold and gold mining stocks. Wood added that breakthroughs in quantum computing will weaken Bitcoin's role as a reliable store of value for pension investors. If the timeline for quantum technology is shortened, some capital allocators will now question Bitcoin's value-store properties. Furthermore, cryptographic attacks may occur sooner than expected, allowing attackers to derive private keys from exposed public keys, thereby undermining the cryptography that underpins Bitcoin balances and mining rewards and challenging its role as "digital gold" for pension portfolios. (Bloomberg)

data.title: PRIVA will launch a privacy policy, with revenue used for dividends and buybacks.
data.description: According to official sources, PRIVA will launch its privacy protocol tonight. Protocol fees will be used to distribute USDT/ETH dividends to nodes and to buy back and burn $PRV, implementing a "real return + deflationary" economic model.

data.title: Dogecoin Flirts With An Inverse Head And Shoulders: $0.15 Break Is The Trigger
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) is trying to base on higher timeframes as Cantonese Cat points to a potential inverse head-and-shoulders on the daily, with price compressing just beneath a defined resistance shelf while holding a nearby demand zone. Dogecoin Breakout Could Target $0. 19 In a daily chart (DOGE/USD, Binance) shared via X on Jan. 16, Cantonese Cat overlays an inverse head-and-shoulders schematic: a left shoulder in early December, a deeper “head” into late December near the mid-$0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin-flirts-with-an-inverse-hs-0-15-trigger/

data.title: Upbit revealed that XRP will be the most traded digital asset in South Korea in 2025.
data.description: According to South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Upbit, XRP became the most traded digital asset on its platform in 2025, with a cumulative trading volume exceeding $1 trillion, surpassing the trading volume of other top cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin.

data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale is using revolving lending to buy tokenized gold, having purchased 8,337 XAUT tokens in the past 20 days, worth $38.4 million.

data.title: Analysis: Crypto market awaits bullish catalyst; Bitcoin volatility falls to four-month low.
data.description: Data shows that Bitcoin's annualized 30-day implied volatility has fallen below 40%, reaching its lowest level since October 5th. The US Senate Banking Committee's postponement of discussion on the market structure bill has become one of the most watched focuses in the crypto market this week. Some analysts warn that failure to pass the bill could trigger a crypto winter. Meanwhile, US-listed spot ETFs saw net inflows of $1.81 billion this week, the largest weekly inflow since October. Deribit executive Sidrah Fariq stated that market sentiment remains cautious but constructive, and a clear bullish catalyst may be needed for the next phase of upward movement. They are awaiting a clear catalyst and additional positive factors for a sustained upward breakout. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance Futures will launch SPORTFUNUSDT and AIAUSDT USDT U-margined perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will launch perpetual contracts at the following times: January 16, 2026, 21:45 (UTC+8): SPORTFUNUSDT perpetual contract, with a maximum leverage of 20x; January 16, 2026, 22:00 (UTC+8): AIAUSDT perpetual contract, with a maximum leverage of 20x.
